svg.text: gpt-oss-20b LoRA FT on HotpotQA · error rate vs time across 107 experiments (log y)
Model: openai/gpt-oss-20b (24L: 12 FA + 12 SWA) · Dataset: HotpotQA (train + n=100 eval) · Context: up to 16K · Metric: error rate (1 − EM)
Scatter = per-run end-of-training EM. Blue stepped line = best-so-far envelope. Karpathy-style log-y declining curve.
107 runs · 99 with err extracted · 8 cancelled (× in cancelled lane) · baseline err 0.87 → min err 0.28

g.text: Day 2 — Divy & I had other GPU work running.
We resumed this line on the 15th.
